violations.text: Quaternary ammonium sanitizer solution was in excess of 500 parts per million (ppm). A quaternary ammonia sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength as indicated on the manufacturers' label. Process corrected on site. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025

The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/21/2025
The facility is lacking drain plugs to effectively fill up three bay sink. Establishment must obtain drain stoppers. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/12/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils both ice machines were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Both ice machines were turned off and put out of order at the time of inspection. Establishment is not to use either ice machine until it is properly cleaned and sanitized. Establishment will use bagged ice for today. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

Chicken and chicken broth, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Per PIC, chicken and chicken broth were both cooked yesterday and were observed at 47 DF. Both food items were voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Proper cooling methods reviewed with staff. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

Spray bottles used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Spray bottles were labeled at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

ROP tilapia was observed thawing with ROP packaging still intact. Tilapia was observed at 36 DF and was taken completely out of the packaging at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025

The cutting boards in the prep unit area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/24/2025

The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the kitchen and bar dishwasher. Establishment is to obtain test strips. New Violation. Correct By: 04/18/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in cooler shelves have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 04/17/2025
A few ceiling tiles in the kitchen observed covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. Ceiling tiles shall be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 12/28/2023

Floor tiles in the kitchen observed in poor repair. Tiles shall be regrouted. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Floors shall be smooth, durable, non-absorbent, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2024
